attributes.additional_details: There is a cost of living crisis and the government is profiting on the general publics hardships. The UK government is to help and protect the people not take advantage by profiting over 70 pence on every litre of fuel sold.
attributes.background: Reduce the duty charged on fuel to help the public as you make more than 70 pence on every litre with the fuel duty and Vat together.

rejection.details: You may wish to sign this petition, which calls for similar action: "Reduce fuel duty tax to at least half of the current rates" https://petition.parliament.uk/petitions/764577
